description:
Lists Checklist (Inspections) in a specified Project grouped by a specified attribute. By default the Checklists are grouped by template.
See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: filters[inspection_type_id]
parameters.description: Array of Inspection Type IDs. Return item(s) associated with the specified Inspection Type IDs.

parameters.name: filters[point_of_contact_id]
parameters.description: Array of User IDs. Return item(s) where the specified User IDs are the point of contact.

parameters.name: filters[inspector_id]
parameters.description: Array of User IDs. Return item(s) where the specified User IDs are inspectors.

parameters.name: filters[list_template_id]
parameters.description: Array of Checklist Template IDs. Return item(s) associated with the specified Checklist Template IDs.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Filters by specific location (Note: Use *either* this or location_id_with_sublocations, but not both)

parameters.name: filters[spec_section_id]
parameters.description: Array of Specification Section IDs. Return item(s) associated to the specified Specification Section IDs.

parameters.name: filters[responsible_contractor_id]
parameters.description: Array of Vendor IDs. Return item(s) where the specified Vendor IDs are the responsible contractor.

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified status value.

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified search query string.

parameters.name: filters[due_at]
parameters.description: Return item(s) due within the specified date range.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

schema.description: Array of Checklists grouped by Template

conforming_response.description: Term used to represent conforming statuses on items within the current template, e.g. "Pass" or "Safe". This maps to an item status of "yes".

deficient_response.description: Term used to represent deficient statuses on items within the current template, e.g. "Fail" or "At Risk".  This maps to an item status of "no".

global.description: Represents whether a response set has been provided by Procore.
